hero_description: HelpHub is a platform where you can ask for assistance or offer your skills to those in need. Simple, direct, and community-driven.
request_help_desc: Post what you need, from moving furniture to technical advice.
offer_skills_desc: Browse requests and contribute your time or expertise to help others.
build_community_desc: Connect with people in your neighborhood and grow together.
login_description: Enter your credentials to access your account
register_description: Fill in the details below to get started
confirm_update_message: Are you sure you want to update your profile with these changes?
delete_profile_warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete_profile_message: Your profile, all your help requests, offers, and messages will be permanently deleted.
check_email: Check your email for the confirmation link!
tell_us_more: Tell us more about your experience...
login_to_post: You need to log in or create an account to post.
